resumen: Anthropic expande Labs, un equipo dedicado a desarrollar productos experimentales en la frontera de las capacidades de Claude. La iniciativa cuenta con el cofundador de Instagram Mike Krieger como líder y busca equilibrar innovación con escalado responsable de productos de IA.
contenido:
Anthropic is expanding Labs, a team dedicated to developing experimental products at the frontier of Claude's capabilities. The initiative brings together leadership including former Instagram co-founder Mike Krieger as it aims to balance innovation with responsible scaling of AI products for enterprise and consumer users.

[Leer artículo completo](https://www.anthropic.com/news/introducing-anthropic-labs)
